---
title: "Team"
listing:
  - id: head
    contents: people/*.qmd
    type: default
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
    include:
      categories: [head]
 
  - id: director
    contents: people/*.qmd
    type: default
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
    include:
      categories: [director]
 
  - id: staff
    contents: people/*.qmd
    type: grid
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
    include:
      categories: [staff]
 
  - id: researchers
    contents: people/*.qmd
    type: default
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
    include:
      categories: [research]
---
 
:::: {.columns}
 
::: {.column width="48%"}
## Group Lead
::: {#head}
:::
:::
 
::: {.column width="4%"}
:::
 
::: {.column width="48%"}
## Managing Director
::: {#director}
:::
:::
 
::::
 
## Staff
::: {#staff}
:::

## Researchers
::: {#research}
:::
